# Figlets Test — Figma Make Guidelines

These files translate the confirmed Figlets Test design-system information exported by Figlets into guidance for Figma Make.
Product character: Design compact, precise, utility-first interfaces for Figma plugins and component-library tooling. Prioritize clarity, scannability, dense but comfortable controls, and native-feeling workflows; use the established token scale consistently and avoid introducing a second visual language.
## Reading workflow
- Read `setup.md` before generating code so the Figlets stylesheet is loaded.
- Read `styles.md` before using CSS variables.
- Read `tokens.md` and the relevant file under `foundations/` before choosing visual values.
- Read [components.md](./components.md) before choosing a Figma component. It routes to the catalog and every available component-specific guideline.
- Read `composition/overview.md` before composing page-level layouts.
## Confirmed rules
- Prefer semantic color variables over primitive palette variables whenever a semantic role fits.
- Use the available spacing, radius, and border variables instead of hardcoded numeric values.
- Use complete typography roles or styles instead of independently improvising font properties.
## Known gaps
- Component names and properties are cataloged from Figma, but component usage policy is included only when confirmed documentation exists.
- Named Figma modes do not imply pixel breakpoints unless widths are explicitly recorded.
